subject: Re: Warp 1.07 & 1.06 crashes in boxnet2mask retraining
body:
Dear all,
I just found out why, I forgot to add the input positive examples 
*_BoxNet2Mask...

I'm so so so sorry of the silliness.

I'll leave my problem here so that nobody would repeat my silly error.
Though I really doubt how many people would do exactly what I've been 
doing...

Thank you very much!
Best,
Linhua Tai 

On Tuesday, March 24, 2020 at 5:54:46 PM UTC+8, Linhua Tai wrote:
>
> Update 3/N,
> I changed the two Rtx 2080 Super to Titan X(Pascal), and Warp 1.0.7 still 
> crashes..
>
> On Tuesday, March 24, 2020 at 4:30:55 PM UTC+8, Linhua Tai wrote:
>>
>> An update, I've tried all available Warp versions, they all crashed, 
>> before Ver 1.0.5, they just exit without an error message, after Ver 1.0.5, 
>> they exit with the same error message as I attached.
>> Maybe it's an hardware limit? Maybe I should get a better GPU?
>> Thank you very much in advance!
>> Yours sincerely,
>> Linhua Tai
>>
>> On Tuesday, March 24, 2020 at 3:57:02 PM UTC+8, Linhua Tai wrote:
>>>
>>> Dear all,
>>> Hi, I'm trying to use warp for picking gold beads, first I ran particle 
>>> picking using boxnet2mask model for 25 micrographs, then I cleaned the 
>>> picked out mask, then when I try to retrain that model, warp always 
>>> crashed. I tried both warp 1.0.7 & 1.0.6, both version gave me the same 
>>> error message back. Crash message have been attached.
>>> I'm using Windows 10 pro with two Rtx 2080 Super GPU, 128GB RAM, 1x 
>>> Intel Xeon W-2135 CPU.
>>> I've seen a similar question but no answer, could anyone help me out 
>>> here?
>>> Thank you very much in advance!
>>> Yours sincerely,
>>> Linhua Tai
>>>
>>
